news.title: Built from the Ground Up: Butler DECA Becomes the Largest Collegiate Chapter in the World
news.summary_en: When Eric Bedrosian ’26 arrived at the Lacy School of Business as a first-year student in Fall of 2022, he brought with him more than memories of high school DECA competitions. He brought an idea, and a challenge.  “I told Dean Craig Caldwell, half-jokingly, that if I came to Butler University, I wanted to start a DECA chapter,” Bedrosian, 2022-2024 Butler…
news.author: Maddie Koss '17
